comingSoon.notifyText: Be the first to know when we launch

educa-one.title: Educa One
educa-one.problem: Public school systems often operate with limited resources, manual processes, and fragmented communication—making it difficult for teachers to manage workloads and for parents to stay actively involved in their child’s education.
educa-one.solution: Educa One is a comprehensive, Ministry of Education aligned platform that digitizes grading, reporting, and communication—giving teachers, parents, coordinators, and directors secure, role-based access to collaborate seamlessly and support student success.

scholar-one.title: Scholar One
scholar-one.problem: Today’s students are highly fluent in technology, yet much of their screen time is unproductive—and they often lack real-time visibility into their academic performance and areas for improvement.
scholar-one.solution: Scholar One transforms the student mobile experience into an intelligent learning system, where grades are gamified, progress is visible, and AI-powered tutors and virtual teachers adapt in real time to help students master subjects and build language skills.

quisqueya-ai.title: Quisqueya AI
quisqueya-ai.problem: While global AI assistants provide general answers, they often lack the cultural nuance, national context, and local understanding needed to truly serve the individuals, businesses, and institutions of the Dominican Republic.
quisqueya-ai.solution: Quisqueya AI is a culturally intelligent national assistant—trained on the language, history, institutions, and spirit of the Dominican Republic to deliver guidance that is locally relevant, context-aware, and rooted in national identity.

isla-intelligence.title: Isla Intelligence
isla-intelligence.problem: Tourism in the Dominican Republic is fragmented and inefficient, with travelers lacking reliable real-time information and local businesses lacking visibility within a unified digital infrastructure.
isla-intelligence.solution: Isla Intelligence is an AI-powered tourism intelligence layer that centralizes real-time data, personalizes traveler experiences, and connects visitors directly to verified local businesses across the island.

cultura-connect.title: Cultura Connect
cultura-connect.problem: Language learning often lacks authentic immersion, making it difficult for learners to gain real fluency and cultural confidence.
cultura-connect.solution: Cultura Connect connects learners with local hosts for real-world Spanish immersion through meaningful conversations and genuine human connection.

terra-vision-ai.title: Terra Vision AI
terra-vision-ai.problem: Real estate development and land investment in the Dominican Republic lack transparent, data-driven insight, leaving investors, developers, and municipalities operating with incomplete information about land value, zoning risk, infrastructure growth, and future demand.
terra-vision-ai.solution: Terra Vision AI is a geospatial intelligence platform that uses AI, satellite data, and predictive analytics to map land potential, forecast growth corridors, and provide real-time development insights for smarter, lower-risk real estate and infrastructure decisions.

title-trust-dr.title: Title Trust DR
title-trust-dr.problem: Property transactions in the Dominican Republic are slowed and complicated by opaque title histories, fragmented records, and limited verification infrastructure, creating risk and uncertainty for buyers and investors.
title-trust-dr.solution: Title Trust DR is a digital title intelligence platform that verifies ownership history, flags legal risks, and streamlines due diligence through centralized, AI-powered property record analysis.
